name: Corky's Pilaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chicken broth or 1 cup water & -1 tsp chicken bullion
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook barley in water, covered for 30 minutes.
2. In a separate pan, sauté onions and garlic in olive oil until tender. Add mushrooms and cook on high heat until all liquid is absorbed.
3. Drain the barley. Stir the mushroom mixture into the barley.
4. Add chicken broth (or water and bullion) and rice to the barley mixture. Bring to a boil, then cover and simmer over low heat for 20 minutes.
5. Stir in green onions and peas before serving.
